name: Creole Beans & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine scallions, cucumber, tomatoes, parsley, oil, cider vinegar, Tabasco sauce with cayenne and allspice to make the salsa.
2. Heat remaining oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add celery and carrots; cook another 2 minutes.
4. Stir in pepper mixture, then continue sautéing until vegetables are tender.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together tomato paste, red wine (or vegetable oil), cider vinegar, brown sugar, mustard, oregano, salt, cayenne, and allspice to form the sauce.
6. Add the sauce to the skillet with the vegetables; stir well.
7. Combine beans with the vegetables and mix thoroughly.
8. Simmer for 30 minutes.
9. Serve hot rice layered with the sauté mixture and salsa.
